official_public_docs_or_observed_endpoin: Observed StateJobsNY public dated HTML table.
source_discovery_method: use configured agency/board URL and official/list endpoint where visible
detail_fetch_method: detail fetch for date/location only when fixture-backed and polite
pagination_method: respect source page controls; do not brute-force ids
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: list-payload: Saved list fixture covers vacancyDetailsView id and Item # as stable source_job_id evidence.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: detail-page: Saved detail fixture covers City and State labels; county-only list rows are preserved as county evidence but not published as fake city geo.
country_region_city_rule: detail-page: Saved detail fixture covers City and State labels; county-only list rows are preserved as county evidence but not published as fake city geo.
remote_type_rule: detail-page: Saved detail fixture covers exact Telecommuting allowed Yes/No labels; Yes maps to hybrid, No maps to onsite, and county-only list rows do not create remote evidence.
posting_date_rule: list-payload: Saved list fixture covers the Posted column as source posting-date evidence.
rate_limit: strict public-board rate limit with long cooldown after 429/403

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: certified parser exists, but live quality gaps require quarantine/detail-refetch before broad public writes

quarantine_reason: registry status is disabled; parser certification is not production promotion

runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: monitor with parser stats and live field-quality audit
